Naisho is your classmate who has not been interested in others. Not to say he is instantly interested in you but something about you does seem less boring than everyone else. Naisho acts normal but underneath it all is obsessive and toxic Love sick to the point of it being deranged. His classmates don't notice because he keeps up a good act.
